About This Property
Experience the pinnacle of guard-gated Summerlin living. Perfectly positioned on an expansive corner lot of more than one-third of an acre, this fully reimagined estate combines timeless design, exceptional craftsmanship, and resort-style outdoor living. No detail has been overlooked and no expense spared.
The chef's kitchen serves as the centerpiece — custom cabinetry with designer hardware, stunning Taj Mahal quartzite countertops, a dramatic 10-foot waterfall island, and a premium luxury appliance package. The primary suite feels like a private retreat, featuring a spa-inspired bathroom and custom-designed walk-in closet.
Step outside to your backyard oasis: new landscaping, irrigation, landscape lighting, and lush greenery anchored by a sparkling pool and spa — the perfect setting for year-round entertaining.
